subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! My tongue - both outwardly and inwardly - and my members and limbs bear witness to Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی شهد لسان ظاهری و باطنی و اعضائی و جوارحی بوحدانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @purpose; goal of creation, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
